profile.notes: User info, credits balance, and account status displayed

my_downloads_api_issue.impact: MEDIUM - Page still loads in browser, but API returns error when called directly
my_downloads_api_issue.possible_cause: Database query issue or environment-specific configuration
my_downloads_api_issue.recommendation: Investigate production logs for the specific error on /api/downloads/my-downloads endpoint

playwright_test_results.notes: Rate limiting on /api/auth/login causes some test failures. This is expected security behavior.

recommendations: Consider adding rate limit bypass for test accounts
